policy: Promotions copy useful primitives into this repository without deleting or replacing their original source paths.

entries.name: reference-doc-workflow

supportingSources.notes: Runtime copy resolves to Apollo and is byte-identical to the source skill.
Installed marketplace copy is byte-identical to the Apollo source; used as supporting evidence while the canonical copy was renamed and rewritten to avoid first-party skill-name collision.

entries.notes: Synthesized into a host-agnostic documentation workflow skill with a local non-first-party name and a one-level reader-testing reference.
